posts.title: More than half the U.S. States signed up to participate in the federal scholarship tax credit program
posts.description: 27 states have elected to participate in the Federal Scholarship Tax Credit program, enabling eligible taxpayers to claim federal tax credits for qualified education contributions.

posts.title: IRS and Security Summit partners announce new framework to better protect taxpayers and tax revenue from fraud
posts.description: The IRS announced a restructuring of the public-private partnership to strengthen protections and enhance information sharing across the tax system.

posts.title: IRS describes agency's activities in fiscal year 2025 Data Book
posts.description: The IRS released the 2025 Data Book detailing agency activities and operations during fiscal year 2025.

posts.title: Treasury, IRS announce intent to issue proposed regulations for excise tax on excess tax-exempt organization executive compensation
posts.description: Treasury and IRS announced Notice 2026-36 regarding proposed regulations addressing excessive compensation and parachute payments to tax-exempt organization employees.

posts.title: IRS announces nationwide hiring events for customer service representatives and tax examining technicians
posts.description: The IRS announced hiring events scheduled nationwide through July for customer service and tax examination positions.

posts.title: IRS releases new look-back interest calculator for long-term contracts
posts.description: The IRS released a calculator to help businesses on large, multi-year construction or manufacturing projects calculate contract-related interest.

posts.title: It's not too late; use IRS Free File today
posts.description: The IRS reminds taxpayers they can still file their 2025 federal tax return at no cost using IRS Free File after the deadline.

posts.title: Treasury, IRS issue Section 892 proposed regulations for sovereign investors
posts.description: Treasury and IRS issued guidance addressing applicability dates for Section 892 regulations exempting foreign governments from tax on passive U.S. investments.

posts.title: IRS to offer Saturday hours at Taxpayer Assistance Centers May 30
posts.description: The IRS announced Saturday hours at select Taxpayer Assistance Centers on May 30 to serve taxpayers.

posts.title: IRS CEO visits Ohio to highlight Working Families Tax Cuts provisions
posts.description: IRS CEO Frank J. Bisignano toured Cleveland highlighting Working Families Tax Cuts provisions on vehicle interest, overtime, and senior deductions.

posts.title: Taxpayers can now view and submit Trump Account elections in their IRS Individual Account
posts.description: The IRS announced new features enabling taxpayers to view and submit Trump Account elections in Individual Accounts for tax-advantaged investing.
